---
applyTo: "backend/**"
---
- This is the backend package of the website online game. It is responsible for handling game logic and providing API for frontend.
- Use colyseus for the backend development. It is a lightweight web framework for TypeScript.
- If this endpoint need to now who the user is, use sessionId and playerToken to identify the user. The sessionId is generated by colyseus and the playerToken is generated by the backend when the user join a room. The playerToken is security sensitive, do not expose to other users.
